name: local-llm-obsidian-knowledge-base
description: A template repository that includes a dev container for running a local LLM and included knowledge base. Add a git repo using `git subtree` or `git submodule` and update it using an MCP Client/Server relationship i.e. `VS Code` extension like `Cline` and the `Filesystem`/`Obsidian-MCP` MCP server.
